input.prompt:
You are Agent 1: STPP Scenario Generation Agent.

Generate one realistic spatial-temporal point-process scenario with exactly
3 directed, interconnected nodes. The final sequence must contain no
more than 365 samples. Return only the scenario text.

NODE CONTRACT
1. Use NODE 0, NODE 1, ... and one monitored variable for every node.
2. Use either one or two DEMAND_SOURCE nodes, never more than two.
3. Each DEMAND_SOURCE has exactly one independent self-generated pattern. A
   recurring daily occ...

output.scenario:
```
TIME SPAN: 7 days
SAMPLING FREQUENCY: 1 hour
TOTAL DATA POINTS: 168
VARIABLE: vehicles per hour (vph)
TIME AXIS:
  - MODE: CYCLIC_LOCAL
  - REPEAT: true
  - REPEAT PERIOD: 24
  - INTERVAL SEMANTICS: inclusive
  - WEEK START: Sunday
  - DAY INDEX: Sunday=0, Monday=1, Tuesday=2, Wednesday=3, Thursday=4, Friday=5, Saturday=6

NODES:
  NODE 0: DEMAND_SOURCE - Suburban residential area. Baseline: 100 vph. Amplitude: 200 vph. Peak: 8 (08:00). Self-generated morning commute pattern.
  NODE 1: PROPAGATION - Urban arterial road. Baseline: 150 vph. Amplitude: 0. Peak: null. Relays traffic from NODE 0 to NODE 2.
  NODE 2: DEMAND_SOURCE - City center business district. Baseline: 120 vph. Amplitude: 180 vph. Peak: 9 (09:00). Self-generated morning office arrival pattern. Also receives propagated traffic from NODE 1.

EDGES:
  Edge 0->1: time_lag_steps: 1, physical delay: 1 hour
  Edge 1->2: time_lag_steps: 1, physical delay: 1 hour

TEMPORAL PATTERNS:
  NODE 0: ORIGIN: self_generated. Pattern: daily morning peak at cycle step 8 (08:00), baseline 100 vph, amplitude 200 vph.
  NODE 1: ORIGIN: ambient_baseline. Pattern: constant baseline 150 vph with propagated variation from NODE 0.
  NODE 2: ORIGIN: self_generated. Pattern: daily morning peak at cycle step 9 (09:00), baseline 120 vph, amplitude 180 vph. Also receives propagated variation from NODE 1.

PROPAGATED ARRIVALS:
  EVENT ID: EVT-001 (originates at NODE 0)
    EVENT FULL PATH: 0->1->2
    NODE 1: ARRIVAL PATH: 0->1, EVENT FULL PATH: 0->1->2, CUMULATIVE LAG TO NODE: 1, ARRIVAL TIME TO NODE: 9 (09:00)
    NODE 2: ARRIVAL PATH: 0->1->2, EVENT FULL PATH: 0->1->2, CUMULATIVE LAG TO NODE: 2, ARRIVAL TIME TO NODE: 10 (10:00)

EDGE MODULATION:
  SCHEDULE ID: EVT-001-weekday
    EVENT ID: EVT-001, PATH: 0->1->2, PATH STAGE: 0, TIME: 6-10, DAYS: [1,2,3,4,5], EDGES AFFECTED: 0->1, EFFECT: strong, DESCRIPTION: Weekday morning peak departure from suburb. Edge activation window at NODE 0.
      DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 7-11
    EVENT ID: EVT-001, PATH: 0->1->2, PATH STAGE: 1, TIME: 7-11, DAYS: [1,2,3,4,5], EDGES AFFECTED: 1->2, EFFECT: moderate, DESCRIPTION: Propagated traffic reaches NODE 1 and continues to NODE 2.
      DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 8-12
  SCHEDULE ID: EVT-001-weekend
    EVENT ID: EVT-001, PATH: 0->1->2, PATH STAGE: 0, TIME: 8-12, DAYS: [0,6], EDGES AFFECTED: 0->1, EFFECT: weak, DESCRIPTION: Weekend late morning departure from suburb.
      DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 9-13
    EVENT ID: EVT-001, PATH: 0->1->2, PATH STAGE: 1, TIME: 9-13, DAYS: [0,6], EDGES AFFECTED: 1->2, EFFECT: weak, DESCRIPTION: Weekend propagated traffic through arterial.
      DESTINATION ARRIVAL WINDOW: 10-14

SPATIAL LAYOUT:
  NODE 0: (0.1, 0.7)
  NODE 1: (0.5, 0.5)
  NODE 2: (0.9, 0.3)
```
